name: Academic Knowledge (Theology)
description: Formal knowledge of scriptures, doctrine, and religious history.

name: Animal Care
description: Looking after domestic animals, livestock, and mounts.

name: Charm
description: Winning people over with persuasion, tact, and smooth talk.

name: Concealment
description: Hiding from enemies or slipping out of sight.

name: Dodge Blow
description: Avoiding strikes in close combat.

name: Drive
description: Handling carts, wagons, and other draft vehicles.

name: Evaluate
description: Judging an item's quality, worth, and trade value.

name: Follow Trail
description: Tracking prey, travellers, and signs of movement.

name: Gamble
description: Reading luck, odds, and gaming tables.

name: Gossip
description: Gathering rumours, tavern talk, and local news.

name: Haggle
description: Negotiating prices and working a better deal.

name: Heal
description: Treating wounds, bandaging injuries, and basic medical care.

name: Intimidate
description: Applying menace, threat, and physical presence.

name: Navigation
description: Finding routes, staying on course, and judging travel lines.

name: Outdoor Survival
description: Living off the land, making camp, and enduring the wild.

name: Perception
description: Spotting danger, clues, and small details others miss.

name: Pick Lock
description: Opening locked containers and doors without a key.

name: Read/Write
description: Reading records and producing legible written text.

name: Search
description: Searching rooms, packs, and hidden corners for something useful.

name: Set Trap
description: Preparing snares and baited traps to catch prey.
